headline: Cummins UK DriveSense Project Adds Detail To Zero Emission Ambitions
summary: Cummins (NYSE:CMI) is leading a UK backed DriveSense project to develop smart electric drive systems for zero emission heavy vehicles. The company is partnering with Transense Technologies to integrate next generation sensing aimed at improving efficiency and monitoring. The project is supported by UK government funding, with a focus on commercial transport applications. Cummins, best known for its powertrain and energy technologies, is putting more focus on electrified systems for heavy...

headline: Assessing Cummins (CMI) Valuation After A Recent Pullback And Undervaluation Signals
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Cummins (CMI) Cummins (CMI) has attracted fresh attention after a sharp move over the past month, with the shares showing a 10.6% decline over that period and a 0.6% decline in the past week. See our latest analysis for Cummins. That recent 10.6% 1 month share price decline comes after a period where momentum had been stronger, with the 90 day share price return at 5.0% and the 1 year total shareholder return at 69.6%. This hints at investors reassessing both...
